learnings.title: Project tsconfig.json should mirror shipping-service include (cover tests + __mocks__/) so nx typecheck catches them
Cross-`@invenco/*` deps in common subpackages go in peerDependencies, not dependencies
Datadog version on Lambdas comes from DD_VERSION env, not stack tags.version
Check inline json-rules-engine usage before widening the Workflow aggregate
shipping-service .gitignore excludes docs/ subdirectories
Run foreman type-check gate with `yarn run check`, not `yarn check`
Mirror non-continuation Context block order in continuation prompt templates
Continuation-conditional runner knobs: swap at construction, keep the session key on base tuning
Assert structured payload fields in prompt-render tests, not just one narrative field
Assert executor-wired createAgentRunner args; the runner mock ignores them
Assert individual serialized field keys, not just a summary marker
Exercise a missing-referent branch via FK ON DELETE SET NULL in foreman tests
Foreman tickets can lag the codebase — verify before implementing
Inlining schema enums into prompt fragments collides with not.toContain token guards
Run `yarn run check`, not `yarn check`, to typecheck foreman
Don't flag a missing fixture when inline text and validator share one source
Reviewing foreman: ForemanError throws are by design, not a Lynk Result violation
Reviewing foreman PRs: local master lags the fork; take the diff from gh pr diff
Feature-flagged nav entries belong in the modern navigation-sidebar, not the legacy nav
Client-paginated list pages must load all backend pages (fetchAllPages), not just the first
Client-side DataTable list pages must load all pages via fetchAllPages
Dedup the first step of a multi-call useGatewayMutation across retries
Cache created-entity id in a ref to avoid duplicate creation on mutation retry
Gateway create payloads may need fields the generated *-interface DTO omits
Retarget bare-token prompt leanness guards when a base change inlines the schema
Review the merge resolution, not the base's changes, when a base-merge lands on an open PR
Independently-saved editor cards re-seeding from a shared query rely on React Query structural sharing
shadcn/radix Select item values cannot be empty strings — use a sentinel for all/none options
A maintainer's 'marking ready' FYI/open-question comment is not an agent change request
Defer large base-integration merge conflicts on a maintainer-owned, active branch
Harden external-config startup validation: bound the page, cover every bucket, report all misses
Write the created record into the React Query cache (setQueryData) so it immediately carries its id for follow-up edits
table-fixed tables need min-width or mobile headers overprint
Verify foreman UI via worktree vite dev (/api proxy to running host)
Long-form table-cell content belongs in a detail Sheet; line-clamp needs whitespace-normal in DataTable cells
Isolate agent-browser with AGENT_BROWSER_SESSION when verifying UI during Foreman execution
Shared shadcn container visual changes: verify backdrop assumptions across all consumers
foreman yarn test/lint carry pre-existing failures unrelated to scoped changes
Inline generated content into prompts behind a shared source + drift guard
Wiring whose effect is one arg to a mocked collaborator needs a call-args assertion, mutation-verified
Keep continuation prompt prefixes cache-stable; thread persisted state instead of re-discovering
Test the structured contract a feature delivers, not just the adjacent narrative
Foreman UI eslint is red on clean master — don't fix unrelated lint in scoped PRs
Verify foreman UI changes via Vite dev proxied to the running server (read-only)
Gate query hooks inside Sheet/Dialog drawers with an `enabled` flag
Don't derive canonical totals from a window-bound secondary source — show an affordance
Name task-keyed attempt rollups Task*, not WorkItem* — "Work item" is the reserved task∪cron umbrella term
Rollup endpoints must compute totals from the post-filter buckets they return
Docker runtime needs a devDependency: promote it in the deps stage, don't COPY the node_modules subtree
Don't let post-success cleanup validation roll back a completed attempt
Model cross-provider runner tuning as a neutral domain field, map at the resolver
Plumb optional Claude CLI flags through the 3-layer runner path
Adding/reordering a runner CLI flag breaks exact-argv tests in two files
Attempt runnerVariant persists effort/variant, never "default"
Don't duplicate a server-owned table on the client; hydrate it
Cross-repo enums coupled by dynamic key lookup must change in lockstep
Ticket 'locked decisions' yield to maintainer override in PR review; propagate the change downstream
Cache write path must reuse the read path's lookup query so identity can't drift
Extending a RateMatchMethod grain enum spans both rate repos + common-domain — extend together or reads silently return empty
`utils.ts` is a standing review-blocker — name files by purpose
Truthiness-gating an optional query field ('' is falsy) disables the branch and can mask tests
Verify 'what landed' against GitHub, not the worktree's stale local origin/master
Trace cross-service consumers before turning a 2xx into a 4xx
Empty filtered result: distinguish misconfiguration from legitimately empty
Wire new persisted fields through domain/mapper in the column-add PR, not as a dark column
Consolidate from the merged commit, not the local worktree
Two paths emitting the same serialized shape need a parity test on edge fixtures — or collapse to one source
Add new seed rows inline beside their siblings, not via a new domain/ abstraction
Consolidating a stacked PR: confirm it reached master, don't trust the MERGED badge
Scout-run per-run metrics must be recorded at completeScoutRun, not createScoutRun
Scout-run durable summary is written at completeScoutRun, not createScoutRun
Test scout-run metric persistence at the scheduler layer, not just runScoutSelection's return
parseLinearMetadata needs a non-empty default branch to emit targets
Foreman full yarn test has environmental 5s-timeout flakes in subprocess suites
Check upstream gating before flagging a serialize-time parser throw as a list regression
Foreman UI lint is red on the base branch; validate only your own files
Split hook-using table cells into a *-cells.tsx to satisfy react-refresh
Reviewing Foreman UI: verify terse/keyed badge copy against the ticket spec before flagging it as a typo
Foreman scout mirrors only includeLabel-tagged issues — UI 'ready-but-untagged' scope branches are forward-compat headroom
Reviewer continuation: distinguish rebase-only head moves from new work via gh pr diff
Reviewer text-less screenshots are verification, not a change request
Foreman http tests mock deps.taskSystem, so provider query assembly needs task-system-<provider> tests
Merging a live superset with a cached set: build the dedup key set from the full cache, not a limit/search-windowed query
On shared/stacked Foreman PR branches, re-check remote before resolving conflicts; never force-push a redundant resolution
Reviewer continuation: verify new commits belong to the PR's ticket — rebases can stack sibling-ticket work
On Foreman shared/stacked PR branches, escalate scope/branch concerns — never rewrite history from a single task worker
Don't treat your own agent reply (empty-body current-head review) as new reviewer feedback
Avoid `prisma format` for targeted schema.prisma edits — it reformats the whole file
Run Prisma via the repo-pinned binary, not global `npx prisma`
In Foreman worktrees, scope PR-review diffs against origin/master, not local master
opencode unattended runs need --dangerously-skip-permissions or the session is disposed before the final result block
Delimiter-in-payload breaks naive agent-result/judge block extraction
Prisma @default belongs in the domain, not the schema — and how to retire one safely
A red Deploy-stage check on a merge commit does not mean the change failed to ship
Dropping a narrowing filter from a Linear query turns its `first: N` cap into silent truncation
Build a merge/dedup key set from the full in-scope collection, not a limit/search-windowed subset
Optimistic mutations must snapshot/roll back every cache key when one entity is fanned across keyed caches
Add tests that fail when a scope-controlling branch or predicate is silently weakened
When a PR grows scope mid-review, re-audit the comments its earlier commits left for the old narrow behavior
Foreman PRs have no CI gate; verify locally and ignore the flaky yarn test baseline
Size a compact number formatter's top tier to the largest total, not the typical row
Foreman UI: make shared data tables responsive via CSS scroll-shadow + table-fixed min-width
Split create from detail by route/dialog — `isNew` is an anti-pattern
Client-side DataTable lists must load all pages via fetchAllPages
Sequential non-idempotent POSTs in one mutationFn duplicate on retry
Keep entity detail hooks minimal; push derivations down; setQueryData over invalidate
Don't gate routes/nav behind local-only feature flags — omit the nav item instead
Storybook/test gateway mocks must return the full persisted DTO
Verify deferred multi-part ticket items actually landed before trusting Done
Don't rely on fire-and-forget (void promise) after the response in Lambda handlers
Error-isolation try/catch around Result-returning calls must also branch on .isSad()
Place cache shadow-compare where both values coexist for the current rollout phase
ddd-core root barrel's browser-unsafety comes from logging-client's eager AsyncLocalStorage, not ddd-core source
